name: Turkey Loaf
recipeIngredient: Fresh basil or dry basil, 1 tablespoon
Fresh parsley or dry parsley, 2 tablespoons
Poultry seasoning or sage, ½ teaspoon
recipeInstructions:
A lower-fat version of traditional meat loaf made with ground beef. Could also be baked as patties with cooking time adjusted.
Combine egg, bread crumbs, seasonings.
Add turkey and onion, mix well.
Press evenly into ungreased 8 x 5 inch loaf pan.
Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes or until done.
Mix sauce ingredients and spread over top before serving. Serves 5 (1 serving = 3 oz., 169 calories; Protein = 22 g; Fat = 6 g; Carbohydrate = 6 g; Fiber = 0.5 g; Cholesterol = 112 mg; Sodium = 146 mg; Potassium = 268 mg).
